//: POWER profile — maximum capability. This is the documented default.
//model: Main agent runs Opus 4.8 at MAX reasoning effort. Highest quality, highest token/$ cost.
//subagents: Heavy subagents run GPT-5.5 at xhigh. 'explore' stays cheap because it is high-volume, low-stakes research.
